{{Quote|Kind of looks like old Coruscant. So big—and all that bustle.|Han Solo|<ref name="DN1">''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]''</ref>}}
'''Yoggoy''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. It was covered in [[Killik hive mound|mounds]] similar to the [[Castle Lands]], with [[Plant/Legends|flowers]] imported from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. The ''[[Tachyon Flier]]'' crashed on Yoggoy in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] in the location known as the [[The Crash (Yoggoy)|Crash]]. It was home to the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] of the [[Yoggoy (Hive)|Yoggoy hive]] and the capital of [[the Colony]].
